repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: {comma separted list of material formats; end with period.}
did.abstract: Subject files, department records, and financial records of the Office of the Treasurer.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Subject files, department records, and financial records of the Office of the Treasurer.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Arthur Peterson papers, #7-1-1808. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
